sourceMovie.title: Babylon
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Babylon (2022) as a drama theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The drama and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Time... in Hollywood
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Babylon clicked for you, Once Upon a Time... in Hollywood (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Babylon?
faq.answer: Try Once Upon a Time... in Hollywood, Ed Wood, Dolemite Is My Name—each shares DNA with Babylon while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Babylon?
faq.answer: Babylon (2022) is best described as Drama, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Babylon worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
